_comment: Species: White Tiger (白虎) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: White Tiger

canonical.appearance: Tiger 8 m long, fur white-gold, stripes glow with killing intent, fangs drip metallic qi
canonical.size: 8 m adult, 20000 jin; true form fills battlefields
canonical.behavior: Divine spirit beast of slaughter; appears at world wars; hunts the wicked
canonical.habitat: Foreign Battleground, slaughter-aspected apex spirit veins
canonical.diet: slaughter-qi, wicked cultivator souls, metal-attribute treasures
canonical.relationships: Bonded to White Tiger Divine lineage; rival of Black Tortoise
canonical.bloodline: True Divine Beast lineage; one of Four Symbols
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: white_tiger — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
